translation: From the Kanesh colony to the messenger our messenger, every single and the stations: A letter came to the City.
In the tablet from the City. From this day when anyone raises claim against the City, Damqaya or Ewa will receive it in the presence of Kanesh.

Since our letter you hear our letter you have heard our letter, either to the palace or in the house of the palace, or in the house of the palace, or in the name of the palace, or in the name of the palace, or in the name of the palace, or in the name of our father, send me word.
I sent our certified tablets to every single and the station. Let the men give either to an agent or to the merchant.
